title: Trump: Fallen troops’ families say ‘finish’ it
shortDescription: President Trump said the families of U.S. service members killed in the Iran war urged him to “finish the job.”

title: Trump aims for regime change in Cuba through 'friendly takeover'
shortDescription: Trump said Cuba could reach a deal for a 'friendly takeover' or not, but it would be 'just as easy' to change the regime without cooperation.

title: Trump responds to bombing of Iranian girls’ school
shortDescription: President Trump said he “doesn’t know enough” about the Iran school strike, saying the incident remains under investigation.

title: Trump 'disappointed' with Iran's new leader
shortDescription: President Trump said he was “disappointed” in Iran's choice for supreme leader and refused to say whether or not the leader has a target on his back.

title: Trump expands 2020 election probe to Arizona records
shortDescription: Federal authorities are now reviewing Arizona records handed over in President Trump's ongoing effort to falsely blame his 2020 loss on fraud.

title: Trump says Putin call was 'a very good talk'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said he had a "very good call" with Russian President Vladimir Putin, discussing Ukraine and the Middle East.

title: Trump on Iran controlling world's oil supply
shortDescription: While discussing Operation Epic Fury, President Trump said the U.S. is focused on keeping "energy and oil flowing" across the world.

title: Deported deaf CA child receives hearing aids from congressman
shortDescription: Rep. Eric Swalwell said his staff traveled to Colombia to return hearing aids to a 6-year-old deaf boy who was deported without them last week.

title: 'Little excursion.' Trump sells Iran war at House Republican retreat
shortDescription: President Donald Trump dropped by his Doral, Florida club to pump up Republican lawmakers ahead of the 2026 midterm elections.

title: White House says Trump's SAVE Act threat not applicable to DHS funding
shortDescription: The White House said President Trump's threats not to sign legislation until the SAVE Act is passed won't apply to Homeland Security funding.

title: Trump refers to Iran war as ‘little excursion’
shortDescription: President Donald Trump cast war with Iran as a "little excursion" during a GOP retreat.

title: Watch live: Trump holds press conference as Iran war continues
shortDescription: As war with Iran continues, President Donald Trump said he is holding a press conference on Monday, March 9 in Florida.

title: Fox News apologizes for Donald Trump's hat controversy at solemn event
shortDescription: President Donald Trump wore a hat at the dignified transfer of fallen soldiers on March 7. He wore a hat, but Fox News aired old footage in error.

title: GOP lawmaker says Muslims 'don't belong' in US, draws harsh criticism
shortDescription: Rep. Andy Ogles posted the statement the same day the Department of Justice indicted two men on federal charges of attempting to support ISIS.

title: Trump Organization seeks 'Trump 250' trademarks
shortDescription: The Trump Organization filed trademark applications related to the nation's 250th anniversary this year.

title: Trump walks back criticism; Iranian soccer players take asylum
shortDescription: President Donald Trump walked back his criticisms of Australia, seemingly unaware the country had already offered asylum to Iran's women's soccer team.

title: Is Donald Trump considering a military draft for Iran? What we know
shortDescription: Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt did not address concerns of a military draft while speaking on FOX News. Is Donald Trump considering a draft for Iran?

title: Trump says he 'will not sign other bills' until the SAVE Act is passed
shortDescription: President Donald Trump pledged his support for the SAVE America Act in a post, writing that he won't sign other bills until the legislation is passed.

title: Gas prices: Trump says 'only fools' should worry about Iran war increases
shortDescription: The president called rising oil prices short-term and "small" prices to pay in a March 8 post. Those who think otherwise, he wrote, are "fools."

title: Republicans confront cooling support among young men over Trump
shortDescription: Polling suggests a softening of support among young men over Trump's policies, threatening Republicans' hopes of retaining majorities in Congress.

title: A Jan. 6 rioter doesn't want Trump's pardon. Supreme Court weighs in.
shortDescription: Glenn Brooks, a home remodeling contractor and a 'deeply religious man,' argued he has the right to try to fully exonerate himself.
